searchBar.subtitle: Scan or search millions of products

apiBox.realTry: Try: Nutella, Oreo, Pepsi, Kit Kat
apiBox.localEnable: Enable Real API for millions of products!

app.noResultsTipBrand: Search by brand name (e.g., Oreo, Nutella)
app.noResultsTipSpelling: Try a shorter or corrected spelling
app.detailsEmpty: Scan or search to view product details
app.disclaimerText: This app provides automated analysis based on ingredients and nutritional data. Always verify halal certification with manufacturers and trusted halal certification bodies. Health information is for general guidance only. When in doubt, consult with a knowledgeable Islamic scholar or healthcare professional.

product.unrecognizedIngredientsWarning: We are unable to recognize ingredients for this product. Please read the label carefully and verify before buying.
product.quickCautionUnknown: Ingredients unknown — check label before buying.
product.quickCautionGelatin: Gelatin may be pork-based — verify source.
product.quickCautionBeef: Beef needs halal certification — verify source.

scanner.title: Scan Barcode
scanner.permissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Please enable in settings.
scanner.notSupported: Barcode scanning not supported on this device
scanner.manualOnly: Please use manual entry - camera only works on mobile devices
scanner.ingredientsScanHint: Take a clear photo of the ingredients list, or paste text manually.
scanner.ingredientsTextareaPlaceholder: Paste or edit ingredients text here...
scanner.noTextFound: No readable text found. Try another photo.
scanner.ocrFailed: Unable to read text from image. You can paste ingredients manually.

ecodes.title: E-Codes Reference
ecodes.importantNoteBody: E-codes marked as "Doubtful" can be halal or haram depending on their source. Always verify with manufacturers or halal certification bodies.

E322.name: Lecithins
E322.concern: Usually plant-based but source should be confirmed

E422.name: Glycerol
E422.concern: May come from plant or animal fat; verify halal source

E441.name: Gelatin
E441.concern: Gelatin is often from pork. Look for halal bovine/fish source or halal certification.

E471.name: Mono/Diglycerides
E471.concern: May be from plant fat or animal fat. Verify halal-certified source.

E472e.name: DATEM
E472e.source: Can be plant or animal origin
E472e.concern: Can be from plant or animal fat derivatives. Check manufacturer halal confirmation.

E476.name: PGPR
E476.concern: Often plant-derived but manufacturer confirmation is safer

E491.name: Sorbitan Monostearate
E491.source: Stearic acid from plant or animal fat
E491.concern: Source may be animal fat; verify halal certification

E627.name: Disodium Guanylate
E627.concern: May be from meat/fish sources. Verify halal certification.

E631.name: Disodium Inosinate
E631.concern: May be from meat/fish sources. Verify halal certification.

E904.name: Shellac
E904.concern: Insect-derived; check halal ruling/certification in your region

E1105.name: Lysozyme
E1105.concern: Animal-derived enzyme; verify source and certification

analysis.no_ingredients: Ingredients are unknown or not provided. Status is doubtful. Please check the label carefully before buying.
analysis.contains_doubtful: Contains doubtful ingredients or additives. Verify halal certification and source details before buying.

about.aboutText: PureBite Halal helps Muslims and conscious consumers identify halal products and make informed food choices. Scan barcodes or search millions of products to get instant halal analysis, health insights, and ingredient information.
about.privacyLocalStorageDesc: All your search history and favorites are stored locally on your device. We do not upload, collect, or share your data.
about.privacyCameraDesc: Camera is used only for barcode scanning. We do not record, store, or access camera images. Your scans are processed locally.
about.privacyThirdPartyDesc: When searching, queries are sent to Open Food Facts and Spoonacular. Please review their privacy policies at their respective websites.
about.privacyRightsDesc: You can delete your data anytime, revoke camera permission, or uninstall the app. Your data is deleted when you uninstall.
about.acknowledgmentsText: This app uses data from Open Food Facts (a collaborative database) and Spoonacular API. We are grateful to these communities for making food information accessible to everyone.
about.communityText: Help improve food data accuracy by contributing to Open Food Facts. Together we can make halal food identification easier for everyone.
about.contactText: Have questions, feedback, or need support? We'd love to hear from you!
about.disclaimerText: This app provides automated analysis based on ingredients and nutritional data. Always verify halal certification with manufacturers and trusted halal certification bodies. When in doubt, consult knowledgeable Islamic scholars or health professionals.
